goal: 实现 Claude native import 与 Codex/Claude cross-agent handoff

summary.title: 实现 Claude native import 与 Codex/Claude cross-agent handoff
summary.what: 新增 Claude Code session backend、neutral transcript 层和 generic import/handoff 路径；CLI 支持 --source codex|claude、--target codex|claude、capsule handoff 以及 Claude/Codex verify；manifest 增加 source_agent、target_support、payloads、lossless_level，并保留 legacy Codex capsule 导入；跨 agent 导入会写目标原生历史和 raw source sidecar；README 与 agent-capsule skill 已同步新命令和边界。
summary.why: 用户需要 Agent Capsule 能在 Claude 原生 UI 里看到导入后的会话，并支持 Claude->Claude 同源导入、Codex<->Claude artifact import，以及同机本地快速 handoff，且不把 link/zip 作为 local handoff 产物。
summary.user_goal: 实现 Claude native import 与 Codex/Claude cross-agent handoff

decisions.chose: 采用 neutral transcript 作为语义桥，同时在目标 agent home 下写 raw source sidecar。
decisions.rationale: 这样 same-agent 保 raw transcript 级别无损，cross-agent 保可见消息、工具证据和上下文，并保留源 raw 数据供目标 agent 后续深挖。

decisions.chose: 直接写入 Claude projects/<escaped-cwd>/<new-id>.jsonl 并维护 sessions-index.json，Claude->Claude 导入重写 sessionId、uuid/parentUuid、cwd、gitBranch。
decisions.rationale: 目标是让导入后成为 Claude Code 可 resume 的新原生 session，同时保证源 session 永不覆盖。

decisions.chose: 新增 capsule handoff，直接读取源 agent 本地历史并写目标原生历史，不生成 link 或 zip；secret scan 命中时返回 warning 而不阻断。
decisions.rationale: 同机 handoff 不创建分享产物，和 artifact export 的安全边界不同；用户明确要求 skill 可全自动完成。

decisions.chose: 直接写入失败时返回 needs_cli_fallback、error 和精确 claude --session-id 命令，不自动调用 Claude CLI。
decisions.rationale: 避免隐式触发可能付费的模型调用，只有显式允许后才应考虑 CLI fallback。

decisions.chose: 将 int_d4e31ace 视为互补前置文档 intent，而不是语义冲突。
decisions.rationale: 该 intent 已在 main 上建立 Codex-only README 并标注 Claude planned；本次是在该基础上把状态推进为 Claude/Cross-agent 已支持。

review_notes: 验证：npm --prefix deploy/cloudflare-worker run check 通过。
验证：npm --prefix deploy/cloudflare-worker test 通过，12 个 Worker 测试通过。
按仓库约束未运行耗时的 make test。

architectural_claims: Agent Capsule supports Codex and Claude Code as source agents and target agents.
same-agent imports create a new native thread/session and never overwrite the source.
cross-agent imports preserve visible messages, tool evidence, working context, and raw source sidecars rather than credentials or private runtime state.
legacy Codex capsules without source_agent still load as Codex capsules.
local handoff reads source local history and writes target native history directly without producing a link or zip artifact.
behavioral_changes: capsule import/restore accepts --target codex|claude and can import encrypted links or zip capsules through the generic import path.
capsule handoff supports --from codex|claude|auto and --to codex|claude.
Claude export reads CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR or ~/.claude, resolves current/latest sessions, and packages claude/session.jsonl plus session index entry.
Claude native restore rewrites JSONL ids and cwd/git metadata, writes sessions-index.json, and returns fallback command details if direct writes fail.
Codex<->Claude imports synthesize target native history from neutral transcript and write agent-capsule-sources sidecars.
link manifest import command defaults to the source agent target, so Claude source links default to --target claude.
security_implications: artifact export still blocks on high-confidence secret scan findings unless --unsafe-include-secrets is explicit.
local handoff reports secret scan findings as warnings because no share artifact is created.
raw source transcripts are copied into local target-agent sidecars and may contain sensitive session content.
Claude CLI/model fallback is not invoked automatically; fallback is returned as a command for explicit user action.
migration_notes: Existing Codex capsules without source_agent remain importable as legacy Codex capsules.
No provider credentials, auth sessions, cloud state, API keys, filesystem checkpoints, or private encrypted runtime state are migrated.
